# kshana ground-station pass-prediction reference vectors
# ORACLE: Orekit 12.2 (Apache-2.0) ElevationDetector+EventsLogger over an
#         ITRF Ephemeris; station = WGS-84 OneAxisEllipsoid TopocentricFrame.
#         Driver: xval/orekit-passes/OrekitPasses.java
# EPOCH:  2024-01-01T00:00:00 (UTC ~ UT1), 24 h window unless noted.
# Satellite samples come from kshana's circular Kepler orbit + IAU-1982 GMST
#   rotation (the propagator/frame are matched, NOT validated); Orekit does
#   the station ellipsoid geometry, ENU elevation and event root-finding.
#
# SCN  name | altitude_km | inclination_deg | raan_deg | arg_lat_deg |
#           station_lat_deg | station_lon_deg | station_alt_m | mask_deg |
#           duration_hours | epoch_y,m,d,h,mi,s
# PASS scn_name | index | aos_s | tca_s | los_s | max_el_deg | duration_s
# COUNT scn_name | pass_count | total_access_s
#
